zh.lifeSummary: 當William Clarke於1490年出生在英國艾可頓 加農時，他的父親Sir John Forde Clarke III42歲，母親Lucia Moyle40歲。他於1539年9月21日與Johanne Poole在英國艾可古德 易亞斯特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1553年9月20日在他的家鄉享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: Clarke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clark
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When William Clarke was born in 1490, in Theydon Garnon, Essex, England, his father, Sir John Forde Clarke III, was 42 and his mother, Lucia Moyle, was 40. He married Johanne Poole on 21 September 1539, in Good Easter, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 20 September 1553, in his hometown, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Clarke est né en 1490, à Theydon Garnon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Forde Clarke III, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Lucia Moyle, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Johanne Poole le 21 septembre 1539, à Good Easter, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1553, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans.

September 1539 in Good Easter, Essex, England Johanne Poole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. September 1553 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ko.lifeSummary: William Clarke(이)가 1490년 영국 에세스 테이던 가넌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Forde Clarke III(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucia Moyle(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1539년 9월 21일 영국 에세스 구드 이스터에서 Johanne Poole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1553년 9월 20일 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Clarke nasceu em 1490, em Theydon Garnon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Forde Clarke III, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Lucia Moyle, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanne Poole em 21 de setembro de 1539, em Good Easter, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1553, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Clarke родился в 1490 г. в местности тидон гарнон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Forde Clarke III было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Lucia Moyle, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanne Poole 21 сентября 1539 г. в местности гуд эастир, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 сентября 1553 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет.
